---
name: Feature Request

---

**Describe the feature**
Be clear and descriptive on what you think would fit with the mod.

**Why do you think I should add this**
Explain why you think, your feature should be added to the mod.

**Additional context (OPTIONAL)**
Provide any examples or concepts to help visualize the feature if the idea is big.
